answers: A debit card is linked directly to your bank account and deducts money immediately when you make a purchase, so you can only spend what you have in your account.
Debit card tomar bank account er sathe connected. Tumi kharcha korle sathhe sathhe tomar account theke taka kete ney, tai overspend hoy na.
Debit cards are great for everyday spending since there's no interest, no debt, and they help you stay within your budget by only using available funds.
Debit cards offer convenience of cashless payments, ATM withdrawals, and online shopping without the risk of accumulating debt like credit cards.
